use_cases: Display FAQs with expandable answers in a space-efficient vertical layout
Showcase product features with rich media content that users can explore
Organize documentation sections with progressive disclosure patterns
Create navigation menus with nested content sections
Present pricing tiers or plan comparisons in an interactive format
ai_summary: A vertical accordion component that displays expandable panels in a single-column layout on mobile and transforms to a horizontal row layout on larger screens. Each panel contains an icon, title, image, and description that expands on click. The component uses framer-motion for smooth open/close animations and includes light/dark mode theming support.
